title: RunnerCheckpointReport
description: Typed advisory checkpoint report from untrusted runner to broker, including gate lifecycle checkpoints.

lifecycle_state.description: Runner checkpoint lifecycle state projected into broker lifecycle vocabulary.

idempotency_key.description: Stable idempotency key for runner checkpoint replay safety.

gate_evidence_ref.description: Optional canonical gate evidence artifact digest for this gate checkpoint when available.

stage_attempt_id.description: Stage attempt identity for retry/recovery tracking.

step_attempt_id.description: Step attempt identity for retry/recovery tracking.

gate_attempt_id.description: Gate attempt identity when checkpoint is gate-scoped.

gate_id.description: Stable gate identity when checkpoint is gate-scoped.

gate_kind.description: Gate taxonomy kind when checkpoint is gate-scoped.

gate_version.description: Gate contract version when checkpoint is gate-scoped.

gate_lifecycle_state.description: Gate lifecycle state when checkpoint_code is gate-scoped.

normalized_input_digests.description: Optional declared normalized input digest identities for deterministic gate evaluation.

pending_approval_count.description: Runner advisory count of currently blocking pending approvals.

details.description: Optional bounded advisory checkpoint details without canonical broker authority.
